(105*u^40 + 1275*u^39 + 7091*u^38 + 24015*u^37 + 55801*u^36 + 95864*u^35 + 129870*u^34 + 147730*u^33 + 147840*u^32 + 131307*u^31 + 101343*u^30 + 66875*u^29 + 38037*u^28 + 18850*u^27 + 7856*u^26 + 2484*u^25 + 505*u^24 + 48*u^23)*v^2 + (15*u^39 + 190*u^38 + 1110*u^37 + 3971*u^36 + 9757*u^35 + 17556*u^34 + 24200*u^33 + 26565*u^32 + 24057*u^31 + 18414*u^30 + 11902*u^29 + 6285*u^28 + 2555*u^27 + 736*u^26 + 132*u^25 + 11*u^24)*v - u^38 - 13*u^37 - 78*u^36 - 286*u^35 - 715*u^34 - 1287*u^33 - 1716*u^32 - 1716*u^31 - 1287*u^30 - 715*u^29 - 286*u^28 - 78*u^27 - 13*u^26 - u^25;
q := (u+v+2)/(v-u);
t := (u-v)*(u+v)*(u+v+2)/(u^3+u^2*v+2*u^2+u*v^2+2*u*v+v^3+2*v^2-2);
E := [0,t^2-2*q*t-2,0,-(t^2-1)*(q*t+1)^2,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(t+1)*(q*t+1),t*(q*t+1)*(t+1)];
